description: Remove the 'NEVER create documentation files (*.md) or README files unless explicitly requested' directive hardcoded in the Write tool system prompt. User has blanket authorization; this directive blocks legitimate doc-generation workflows.

patches.search_regex: - NEVER create documentation files \(\*\.md\) or README files unless explicitly requested by the User\.
patches.replace: - Documentation files (*.md) are allowed when helpful./*vdoc1*/
patches.description: Remove anti-docs directive in Write tool prompt

patches.search_regex: - NEVER proactively create documentation files \(\*\.md\) or README files\. Only create documentation files if explicitly requested\.
patches.replace: - Documentation files (*.md) are allowed when helpful./*vdoc2*/
patches.description: Remove anti-docs directive in general-purpose agent prompt
